message:
refactor(ffs-mvcc): use BTreeSet for SSI write keys and tighten lock scope

- Replace BTreeMap<BlockNumber, ()> with BTreeSet<BlockNumber> for committed
  txn write_keys — semantically correct and avoids phantom unit values
- Narrow Mutex lock scope in lab_ssi_rejects_write_skew test to drop the
  guard before the assertion, preventing potential deadlock on panic

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
